name: hebrew-book-producer
description: Hebrew non-fiction book production pipeline — lectorship, literary editing, linguistic editing, proofreading, typesetting, and a book-writer agent. Natural-language entry-point: 'תוכל להגיה את הספר שלי?' auto-bootstraps the project. Bridges CandleKeep (shared Hebrew Linguistic Reference), Sefaria MCP (Jewish-source verification), and the user's curated writing-craft library.
